title: Prison Mod
description: Prison Mods for pro minecraft players.
body: Prison Modpack turns Minecraft into the ultimate prison experience! Start as a low-level inmate and mine, grind, and trade your way up the ranks. Unlock new tools, blocks, and rewards as you progress, automate your processes with special mods, and compete with friends to dominate the prison. Perfect for both solo play and server communities, this modpack adds custom mechanics, challenges, and progression systems that make prison life intense, rewarding, and addictive. Every decision matters—can you climb to the top and earn your freedom?
